series_metadata.series_description: Record contains all work documents used to write Ohio Health Plan Policy, such as policy research information referencing reasons for payment or non-payment of claims, samples of provider and/or patient claims, claims processing and reimbursement information, surveys of provider services, meeting notes, contractor reports, budget material, and related correspondence from constituents regarding the status of claims and services provided and any issues that have not been resolved.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain in office until policy is superseded, obsolete or replaced, then review by State Archives prior to disposition. ; Paper: Retain in office until policy is superseded, obsolete or replaced, then review by State Archives prior to disposition., Electronic: Erase ; Paper: Recycle
